title: Subscription
description: Implementation of the 'Subscription' model. A webhook subscription

eventIds.description: The events that are to be sent to this subscription's `webhookUrl`.

eventSchemaVersion.description: The event schema version associated with the subscription. Currently, this is always `1`.

referenceId.description: An arbitrary ID that can be specified in the POST Subscription request body, and is saved for the requesting developer's use.

status.description: The subscription's current status. *Possible Values:* 1. `PendingActivation` - The subscription is created but not receiving event notifications. To start receiving event notifications, set the subscription’s status to `Active` using the PATCH Subscription endpoint. 2. `Active` - The subscription is active and can receive event notifications. 3. `DeactivatedByUser` - You deactivated the subscription. 4. `DeactivatedByAdmin` - Mindbody deactivated your subscription. 5. `DeactivatedTooManyFailedMe

statusChangeDate.description: The UTC date and time when the subscription's status was last updated.

statusChangeMessage.description: A message generated by Mindbody that explains why a subscription's status changed.

statusChangeUser.description: The first name of the developer or Mindbody staff member who changed the subscription's status.

subscriptionCreationDateTime.description: The UTC date and time when the subscription was created.

webhookUrl.description: The webhook to which the listed `eventIds` are sent.
